title: I Begin From Where I Am
subtitle: A release-and-allow practice for accepting your body today as the starting point
excerpt: An energy statement for the frustration of not being at the body you want. Releases the urge to require yourself to be different before you begin, and allows the body as it is right now to be the valid starting point.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 1 of WEIGHT LOSS: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

content.text: An energy statement for the moment you notice the gap between your body now and the body you want, and feel the gap as a problem with the starting point. The practice releases that framing and replaces it with one that can move.
I am ready to release the requirement that my body be different before I begin. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow my body as it is right now to be the valid starting point. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.

Adapted from Day 1 of WEIGHT LOSS: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025), which opens with the principle that the only usable starting point is the one you are actually at. The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
